title: A Sister of Six
writer: Geza Herczeg, Ragnar Hyltén-Cavallius, Paul Merzbach
actors: Willy Fritsch, Betty Balfour, Anna-Lisa Ryding
plot: The young Tony will travel from Budapest to the countryside to marry his cousin Katinka, the oldest of the seven sisters Gyurkovics. Because Tony is already secretly married to another, the situation is problematic.
